error_signature: unreadable characters when converting binary to text
title: Binary data conversion results in unreadable characters
symptom: The workflow attempts to convert binary data to text, resulting in unreadable characters. The output shows that the text extraction method is not yielding readable text.
applies_when: Using a code node to process binary data
The binary data is not plain UTF-8 text
not_this_if: The binary data is plain UTF-8 text
The workflow does not involve binary data
root_cause: The error occurs because the binary data being processed is not in a format that can be directly converted to UTF-8 text. For example, files like PDFs or DOCX require specific parsers to extract readable text, as they contain structured data rather than plain text.
fix_steps: Identify the actual file type of the binary data (e.g., PDF, DOCX).
Use an appropriate parser for that file type instead of converting it directly to UTF-8.
agent_instruction: Use a specific parser for the file type instead of converting binary data directly to UTF-8.
